name: Taco Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb ground beef, browned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the lettuce by tearing it into bite-sized pieces.
2. Cook the ground beef in a pan until browned and then drained off excess fat.
3. Add the taco seasoning mix to the cooked beef according to package instructions.
4. Mix in the red kidney beans.
5. Shred the cheddar cheese and add it to the mixture.
6. Pour the French salad dressing (or Western/Catalina) over the ingredients.
7. Crumble the Doritos® into small pieces and sprinkle them on top.
8. Chop the onion and tomatoes, then mix them in with the rest of the ingredients just before serving.
